titles.title: Seek ye first the kingdom of God

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Seek ye first the kingdom of God, And His righteousness. And all these things shall be added unto you, Hallelu…, Hallelujah.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Hallelujah, hallelujah! Hallelujah, hallelujah! Hallelu…, Hallelujah!
